conversations.scenario: Monday morning at the coffee machine

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Hey! Did you end up doing anything fun this weekend?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Yeah, I actually went hiking with a couple of friends. The weather was perfect for it.

conversations.expected: yeah i actually went hiking with a couple of friends the weather was perfect for it

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Good morning! How's the commute treating you these days?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Not bad, actually. I switched to taking the train and it's been way better.

conversations.expected: not bad actually i switched to taking the train and its been way better

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Hey, are you ready for the presentation? Need any help with anything?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: I think I'm good. I just need to review the third slide one more time.

conversations.expected: i think im good i just need to review the third slide one more time

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Want to grab lunch? There's a new Thai place around the corner.

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Sure, that sounds great. I've been wanting to try something different.

conversations.expected: sure that sounds great ive been wanting to try something different

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: What did you think of the new quarterly targets? They seem pretty ambitious.

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Honestly, I think they're achievable if we prioritize the right projects.

conversations.expected: honestly i think theyre achievable if we prioritize the right projects

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: I'm still figuring out the expense system. Any tips?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Yeah, just make sure you attach the receipt before you submit it.

conversations.expected: yeah just make sure you attach the receipt before you submit it

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: How did the call with the client go? Were they interested?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: They were really enthusiastic about the proposal. I think we'll close this one.

conversations.expected: they were really enthusiastic about the proposal i think well close this one

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Any plans for the weekend? I'm thinking about checking out that new restaurant.

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: Nothing specific yet. I'll probably just relax and catch up on some reading.

conversations.expected: nothing specific yet ill probably just relax and catch up on some reading

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: The deadline got moved up to Thursday. Think we can make it?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: It'll be tight, but if we split the remaining work between us, we should be fine.

conversations.expected: itll be tight but if we split the remaining work between us we should be fine

conversations.scenario: Wrapping up a phone call with a customer

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: That covers everything. Thank you so much for walking me through this.

conversations.expected: that covers everything thank you so much for walking me through this

conversations.scenario: Introducing yourself at a networking event

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: Hi! I don't think we've met. What do you do?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: I work in product development. We're building tools that help small businesses grow.

conversations.expected: i work in product development were building tools that help small businesses grow

lines.speaker: coworker
lines.text: How do you think the sprint went overall?

lines.speaker: user
lines.text: I thought the collaboration was solid, but we could improve our estimation process.

conversations.expected: i thought the collaboration was solid but we could improve our estimation process
